授業方法: Various methods including, pair and group work, listening exercises, dialog construction and presentation.Each class will consist of various speaking and listening skills, pair work and group activities.  Creating and writing theme-based dialogs and presenting them will also be included.

第1回:
【Startup Week】      【Flex Hours】  "Online class（On-demand format）"《30 minutes》　　Orientation, understanding rules and regulations, class introduction   Assignment:  Write a 200 plus word self-introduction essay and bring to class next week.

https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=ad18e90e-7703-46d6-9191-b3ee008528a8
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】   "Face-to-face class"《90 minutes》Introduction:  review of class format,, classroom interview chart, self-introductions
Review of introduction, goals and aspirations. 45 minutes of out of class study.
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】   "Face-to-face class"　　《 90 minutes》　　Text "Lifestyle" pair work gap exercise, listening and reading comprehension
Extending the dialogs of the in-class exercise. One hour of out of class study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】    "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　Text "Lifestyle" continued, prepositions, pair dialog about your lifestyle now
Essay writing: How to improve your lifestyle. One hour or more of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】   "Face-to-face class" 　　 《90 minutes》　　　Text "Food" chemistry, nutrition, shortages, vocabulary matching drills
Grammar perspective worksheet assignment. One hour of study.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】    "Face-to-face class" 　　 《90 minutes》　　　Text "Food" continued, comparing diets, listening comprehension drills
Introducing strange food items from around the world. One hour of research study.
第7回: 【Flex Hours】  "Online class（On-demand format）" 《90 minutes》　　lessons to be uploaded onto LUNA
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】    "Face-to-face class"　　 《90 minutes》　　　Text "Sports" present tense, common "wh" questions, pair work gap exercise
Presentation first draft. 90 minutes of out of class study.
第9回: 【Core Weeks 7】   "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　　　pair work vocabulary memory activity, individual presentation instruction, first draft
Revision of presentation. One hour of study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】  "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　Individual presentations and feedback, Text "Marriage" reading comprehension, describing people
Essay writing of critique of presentation. One hour of study.
第11回: 【Core Weeks 9】    "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　　Text "Marriage" continued, listening comprehension, newlywed pair work dialog construction and presentation
Review of in-class study and research of marriage customs from around the world. One hour or more of study.
第12回: 【Flex Hours】    "Online class"Online class（On-demand format）"《60 minutes》　　lessons to be uploaded onto LUNA
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】   "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》　　　Text "Environment" pair work gap exercise, group activity interview chart
Note taking to bring to the next class about environmental issues concerning us all. One hour or more of study.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】  "Online class（On-demand format）" 《90 minutes》　　lessons to be uploaded onto LUNA

Environmental vocabulary worksheet assignment. One hour of out of class study.
Exam study.
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】     "Face-to-face class"《90 minutes》　　　Text "Environment" continued, addressing problems, offering solutions, vocabulary and usage,  Exam explanation and practice
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】    "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　　【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
